name: Dashboard displays stats and daily quests after login
description: After logging in, the dashboard shows the user's cards due count, streak, XP, coins, and today's quest progress bars with animated fill.

planSteps.description: Enter valid credentials and submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load completely
Verify the dashboard displays a cards-due counter, a streak indicator, and a Today's Quests section with at least one quest item showing a progress bar
